# Other Stuff

> Other Stuff is an AI-first product studio based in Perth, Western Australia. We help Australian organisations build practical internal AI capability through hands-on experience.

## What We Do

Other Stuff works with Perth businesses, schools, and organisations across Western Australia to help their teams understand and apply AI through hands-on experience — not theory. We believe AI capability develops through many small improvements that compound over time.

## Location

- Based in City Beach, Perth, Western Australia 6015
- Serving businesses across Perth, Western Australia, and Australia

## Our Products and Services

### Speedrun Workshop
- URL: https://otherstuff.ai/speedrun
- A 3-hour hands-on AI workshop delivered in Perth for teams and SMEs
- Participants learn to use AI by building practical tools with AI agents
- No coding experience required
- For SME operators and team leads in Western Australia

### Level Up Workshop
- URL: https://otherstuff.ai/levelup
- A 90-minute AI workshop for high school students in Western Australia
- Students learn how AI works by building their own game
- Designed for junior to middle high school students
- No prior coding required, works with standard school devices

### Marginal Gains
- URL: https://otherstuff.ai/marginal-gains
- Ongoing AI capability development for Australian SMEs
- Monthly working sessions, shared learning, and hands-on support from Perth-based Other Stuff
- Members work hands-on with AI agents that support day-to-day work
- Designed to develop AI champions inside businesses

### Wingman
- Open-source AI agent management system
- Central tool that enables practical AI capability across teams

## Media

### The Good Stuff (Podcast)
- URL: https://otherstuff.ai/the-good-stuff
- An Australian AI podcast with Pete Winn and Andy David from Perth
- Exploring everyday experiences working with AI and how it's changing work, business, and human potential

### Writing
- URL: https://otherstuff.ai/writing
- Notes, ideas, and fieldwork from building with AI in Perth

### Games
- URL: https://otherstuff.ai/games
- Playable games built with AI by Other Stuff in Perth as examples of rapid AI-assisted development

## Team

- Pete Winn — Co-Founder. Background in process redesign, deep tech, and large enterprise deployments (Rolls Royce, Rio Tinto).
- Andy David — Co-Founder. Background in venture design, management consulting, and technology startups.
